## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Safety and provenance

- [ ] I used only public, synthetic, or user-authorized material.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, personal data, paid content, private corpus, or personal email.
- [ ] I kept `skills/master-system-builder/` as the single canonical skill.
- [ ] I preserved license and provenance notices.

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_distribution.py`

If a check does not apply, explain why in the PR description.
